landing.text:
Customer.io Platform: Automation, Data, Content Creation
Website Data Collection Preferences
We use cookies and other tracking technologies to create a more personalized experience. You can find more information about how we use these services in our
Privacy Policy
and
Cookie Declaration
. By clicking 'I Accept,' you consent to the use of cookies and other tracking technologies.
I accept
Platform
Solutions
Pricing
Resources
Sign in
Get started
Get started
Book a demo
Book a demo
More impact
from every
message
in-app
Turn customer data into personalized experiences with a platform that gets more powerful over time.
Get started
Get started
Book a demo
Book a demo
14-day free trial
No credit card required
Cancel anytime
The customer engagement platform
trusted by
9,000+ brands
80%
See how Attio achieved
80% billing renewal rates
by leveraging attributes and dynamic segments.
Read more
We unify your
data
,
messaging
, and
AI
into a single platform, so every interaction with your
customers
is
stronger
and more
relevant
than the last
Intelligence that compounds.
The more you use the platform, the sharper it gets.
Orchestration that scales.
One platform for every channel, message type, industry, and geography.
Built for agents, not just humans.
Works with any AI tool using MCP, CLI, API or webhooks.
Capabilities
Everything you need to
engage customers
Platform overview
Journeys
Build automated campaigns that improve with every send.
Audiences
Reach the right people using data-driven segmentation.
Data & integrations
Use your customer data to drive better personalization.
Design Studio
Create beautiful messages at scale without complexity.
Analytics
Surface insights that help you deliver business performance.
AI Agent
Meet
your
AI
Agent
Tell it what you want, and it gets to work so your team spends less time configuring and more time on what matters most.
Meet your Agent
Build campaigns in a conversation
Go from a single prompt to a fully configured campaign with triggers, content, timing, and logic, so you can launch more quickly.
Analyze performance instantly
Ask how any campaign is doing and get clear, data-grounded recommendations.
Remember everything about your business
Your Agent automatically carries your brand voice, goals, and preferences across every session.
Solutions
Support every stage of the
customer journey
Retention
Respond proactively to engagement signals and churn risk.
Activation
Guide new users toward meaningful actions using behavioral triggers.
Onboarding
Create welcome flows that ensure new users are ready to take first steps.
Cross-sell & upsell
Personalize cross-sell and upsell campaigns based on product usage.
Enterprise ready
Infrastructure built for teams and the
 agents that support them
Integrations
Integrates with the tools
you use most
Connect your data, apps, and AI tools to a single platform that scales with your business.
Security
Security you
can trust
Protect customer data with enterprise-grade safeguards for both your team and AI agents.
Support
Support you can
count on
Email and chat support are available, with hands-on implementation and ongoing guidance when you need it.
Case studies
Trusted to power billions of
customer interactions
All case studies
28%
Increase in click-through rates
22%
Increase in email conversion rates
“
Customer.io has become the heartbeat of our lifecycle marketing strategy, empowering us to communicate with users in a way that feels genuinely relevant and personal.
Simon Heaton
Director of Growth Marketing
Read more
3.36%
Drop in cancellations
4.4%
Boost in key app engagement
“
Because we have every event flowing into Customer.io, we were able to build a journey that adapts to what each user is actually doing—or not doing.
Sue Cho
Head of Lifecycle Marketing
Read more
GDPR compliant
AICPA SOC certified
Users love us
Security first
HIPAA compliant
Supercharge your messaging

Integrations | Customer.io
Website Data Collection Preferences

and

Platform
Solutions
Pricing
Resources
Sign in
Get started
Get started
Book a demo
Book a demo
Customer.io Integrations
Integrate
your
favorite
tools
Synchronize your data to unlock the full potential of the tools you rely on most. Gain actionable insights and drive personalized experiences by activating your tech stack with seamless data connectivity.
Sources
Integrate your data warehouses and other sources to personalize and power your campaigns. Connect your first-party data via pre-built integrations, APIs, SDKs, webhooks, and more.
Source catalog
Destinations
Effortlessly transfer data to external destinations. Customer.io supports multiple integration options for key use cases like campaign reporting or the creation of lookalike audiences for ads.
Destination catalog
Customer top picks
Featured
integrations
Amazon S3
Streamline data transfer from Customer.io to Amazon S3 storage, including messages, people, metrics, and more.
Learn more
Amplitude
Enhance your audience insights by integrating Amplitude's data with your user and analytics data.
Learn more
Branch
Enable seamless email-to-app linking by integrating Branch with your messaging workflows.
Learn more
Salesforce
Sync customer data and trigger personalized campaigns based on sales activities, deal stages, and CRM updates to create seamless experiences across your sales and marketing funnel.
Learn more
Facebook Lead Ads
Sync Customer.io data with Facebook campaigns to convert leads to customers or users.
Learn more
Google Ads
Automatically export Customer.io segments as audiences for Ad Networks, perfect for lookalike or retargeting campaigns.
Learn more
Mixpanel
Leverage Mixpanel in combination with your user and analytics data for a deeper understanding of your audience's behaviors.
Learn more
Snowflake
Transfer Customer.io data, including messages, people, and metrics, to your Snowflake warehouse via Amazon S3 or Google Cloud Project (GCP) storage.
Learn more
Twilio
Utilize Twilio’s SMS action in Customer.io for seamless communication with your customers.
Learn more
Typeform
Integrate forms with your workspace to add people automatically and trigger campaigns based on submissions.
Learn more
Segment
Filter and map event and attribute data as both a destination and source with Segment.
Learn more
Hubspot
Connect your HubSpot CRM data to deliver targeted messaging based on contact properties, deal progression, and marketing interactions for unified customer engagement.
Learn more
See all integrations
See all integrations

Cloud

analysis.name: Customer.io
analysis.value_proposition: Unified customer engagement platform that combines data, multi-channel messaging, and AI automation to deliver personalized lifecycle campaigns at scale.
analysis.ideal_customer: Growth, lifecycle, and marketing teams at B2B/B2C SaaS or app companies that need event-driven, multi-channel automation with deep data integration and compliance requirements.

features.name: visual workflow builder
features.description: Drag-and-drop canvas for building automated campaign journeys with triggers, branches, and delays.

features.name: cross-channel campaign automation
features.description: Orchestrate campaigns across email, push, in-app, SMS, WhatsApp, LINE, and webhooks from a single workflow.

features.name: email campaigns
features.description: Behavioral and broadcast email sending with personalization; Essentials includes 1M sends/month.

features.name: transactional emails
features.description: Unlimited transactional email sends separate from marketing volume.

features.name: push notifications
features.description: Mobile and web push notification channel included in all plans.

features.name: in-app messages
features.description: In-app messaging channel with unlimited monthly sends on all plans.

features.name: sms campaigns
features.description: SMS channel available on all paid plans with custom volume pricing.

features.name: whatsapp messaging
features.description: Native WhatsApp channel for customer messaging (not third-party workaround).
features.evidence_quote: Customer.io's biggest product release: AI Agent, WhatsApp, LINE, and more!

features.name: line messaging
features.description: Native LINE channel for customer messaging.
features.evidence_quote: Customer.io's biggest product release: AI Agent, WhatsApp, LINE, and more!

features.name: webhook send & receive
features.description: Send and receive webhooks as a campaign channel; unlimited on all plans.

features.name: api-triggered broadcasts
features.description: Trigger broadcast messages to segments via API call, with support for personalized trigger data.

features.name: newsletter broadcasts
features.description: One-time broadcast and newsletter sending to segments.

features.name: anonymous data tracking
features.description: Track and merge anonymous visitor activity before identity resolution.
features.evidence_quote: Anonymous people — Anonymous activity — Merging anonymous activity

features.name: anonymous messages
features.description: Send messages to anonymous (unidentified) profiles; available on Premium and Enterprise.

features.name: ai agent
features.description: Conversational AI agent that configures campaigns, analyzes performance, and remembers brand context across sessions.
features.evidence_quote: Tell it what you want, and it gets to work so your team spends less time configuring

features.name: ai agent persistent memory
features.description: Agent retains brand voice, goals, and preferences across sessions automatically.
features.evidence_quote: Your Agent automatically carries your brand voice, goals, and preferences across every session.

features.name: ai agent execution skills
features.description: Configurable skills the AI agent can execute; core skills on Essentials, custom skills on Premium/Enterprise.
features.evidence_quote: Core Execution Skills / Custom Execution Skills — 3 / 10 / Custom

features.name: ai agent routines
features.description: Scheduled automated tasks the agent runs; weekly on Essentials, daily on Premium.
features.evidence_quote: Daily Routines (scheduled tasks) — Routines: frequency — Weekly / Daily / Custom

features.name: llm actions
features.description: Use large language models as actions inside campaign workflows; 100K credit sample on Essentials.
features.evidence_quote: LLM actions (beta) — LLM actions with 100K credit sample

features.name: send-time optimization
features.description: Automatically optimize message send times based on individual engagement data.

features.name: in-app message suggestions
features.description: AI-generated suggestions for in-app message content within the platform.

features.name: email content analysis
features.description: AI analyzes email content for performance improvements and quality checks.

features.name: in-app survey analysis
features.description: AI-powered analysis of in-app survey responses.

features.name: mcp server
features.description: Model Context Protocol server enabling AI tools and agents to interact with Customer.io directly.

features.name: ai-powered segment builder
features.description: Build audience segments using natural language or AI-assisted logic.

features.name: suggested segments
features.description: AI proactively suggests audience segments based on available data.

features.name: data-driven segments
features.description: Dynamic segments that update automatically based on profile attributes and event data.

features.name: manual segments
features.description: Static hand-curated audience segments.

features.name: ad audience sync
features.description: Export Customer.io segments as audiences to ad networks for lookalike and retargeting campaigns.

features.name: custom collections
features.description: Non-people data collections for structuring complex relational data.

features.name: custom objects
features.description: Associate non-person data (accounts, orders, devices) with people to power personalization.

features.name: nested data
features.description: Store and use nested JSON structures in profiles and segments.

features.name: data index
features.description: Searchable index of all available customer data attributes and events within the workspace.

features.name: connected forms
features.description: Embed or connect web forms to automatically add people and trigger campaigns on submission.

features.name: reverse etl
features.description: Sync data from warehouses back into Customer.io profiles.

features.name: data warehouse destinations
features.description: Export Customer.io data (messages, people, metrics) to data warehouses like Snowflake.

features.name: data replay
features.description: Replay historical event data through campaigns and workflows.

features.name: privacy management
features.description: Built-in tools to manage data privacy, consent, and deletion requests.

features.name: drag-and-drop visual editor
features.description: WYSIWYG email editor for building messages without code.

features.name: code editor
features.description: HTML/CSS code editor for full custom email templating.

features.name: ai-generated global styles
features.description: AI generates consistent brand styles across all email messages.

features.name: ai translator for messages
features.description: AI translates message content into other languages automatically.

features.name: reusable components
features.description: Shared content blocks (headers, footers, CTAs) reusable across email templates.

features.name: saved templates & version control
features.description: Save and version-control email templates with history and rollback.

features.name: dark mode support (email)
features.description: Design emails with dark mode variants for compatible email clients.

features.name: responsive styles
features.description: Responsive email styles that adapt to different screen sizes.

features.name: mjml framework support
features.description: Write emails using MJML markup language for responsive email design.

features.name: liquid templating
features.description: Liquid templating language for dynamic personalization in messages, with conditionals and loops.

features.name: scalable personalization
features.description: Personalization at scale using profile attributes, events, and object data.

features.name: custom smtp
features.description: Send emails through a custom SMTP provider instead of Customer.io's infrastructure.

features.name: campaign goals & conversion criteria
features.description: Define measurable goals for campaigns and track conversion rates against them.

features.name: a/b & multivariate testing
features.description: Test multiple message variants and workflows to optimize performance.

features.name: conversion tracking
features.description: Track downstream conversions attributed to campaigns.

features.name: campaign reporting
features.description: Per-campaign analytics including open rates, clicks, conversions, and deliverability metrics.

features.name: workspace performance dashboard
features.description: High-level dashboard showing aggregate performance across all campaigns in the workspace.

features.name: survey analysis
features.description: Analyze in-app and message survey responses within the platform.

features.name: data export
features.description: Export campaign and people data for external analysis.

features.name: reporting webhooks
features.description: Outbound webhooks delivering real-time campaign metric events to external systems.

features.name: universal search
features.description: Cross-entity search covering people, templates, campaigns, docs, and newsletters with inline previews.
features.evidence_quote: Universal search now covers even more data, including templates, people, product documentation, and newsletters.

features.name: sso & 2-factor authentication
features.description: Single sign-on and two-factor authentication for secure team access.

features.name: role-based permissions
features.description: Standard RBAC on all plans; custom granular permissions on Premium+.
features.evidence_quote: Standard role-based permissions / Custom role-based permissions

features.name: audit logging & data governance
features.description: Immutable audit log of all account actions for compliance and governance.

features.name: hipaa compliance
features.description: HIPAA-compliant infrastructure available on Premium and Enterprise for healthcare use cases.

features.name: soc ii compliance
features.description: SOC Tier II certified infrastructure for enterprise security assurance.

features.name: gdpr compliance
features.description: GDPR-compliant platform with EU data center option.

features.name: us / eu data centers
features.description: Choose data residency in US or EU regions for compliance.

features.name: dedicated hardware
features.description: Isolated dedicated infrastructure for Enterprise customers.

features.name: managed deliverability
features.description: Customer.io manages email deliverability infrastructure and reputation on behalf of customers.

features.name: mobile sdks
features.description: Native SDKs for iOS, Android, React Native, Expo, and Flutter.
features.evidence_quote: Mobile SDKs — iOS — Android — React Native — Expo — Flutter

features.name: pipelines api
features.description: API for ingesting event and profile data into Customer.io at scale.

features.name: track api
features.description: Event tracking API for sending behavioral data into Customer.io.

features.name: app api
features.description: REST API for managing people, campaigns, segments, and messages programmatically.

features.name: csv import/export
features.description: Import and export people, events, objects, and relationships via CSV files.
features.evidence_quote: Import people or events via CSV — Import objects or relationships via CSV

features.name: workspaces
features.description: Multiple isolated workspaces per account; 2 on Essentials, unlimited on Premium+.

features.name: multi-account switching
features.description: Log into multiple Customer.io accounts and switch without logging out.
features.evidence_quote: You can now log into multiple Customer.io accounts and switch between them without logging out.

features.name: unlimited seats
features.description: No per-seat pricing; unlimited team members on all plans.

features.name: webhook-triggered campaigns
features.description: Trigger campaign entry via inbound webhook payloads.

features.name: campaign exit conditions
features.description: Define conditions that remove people from a campaign before completion.

features.name: grace periods
features.description: Configurable grace periods before campaign re-entry or suppression rules apply.

features.name: campaign recipes
features.description: Pre-built campaign templates including welcome, cart abandonment, double opt-in, trial expiration, and onboarding.
features.evidence_quote: Campaign recipes — Our Recipe Book — Send a Welcome Email — Cart Abandonment — Double Opt-In

features.name: rss feed email campaigns
features.description: Automatically send email campaigns triggered by RSS feed updates.

features.name: cohort testing
features.description: Run cohort-based tests to compare campaign performance across user groups.

features.name: subscription types
features.description: Create multiple subscription types for granular messaging consent management.
features.evidence_quote: How do I create multiple subscription types?

features.name: whatsapp templates
features.description: Create and manage WhatsApp message templates within Design Studio.

features.name: design studio collaboration
features.description: Team collaboration on email designs including feedback submission and version history.
features.evidence_quote: Collaborate with teammates — Submit & manage feedback — Manage version history

features.name: startup program
features.description: 12 months free for early-stage companies that have raised under $10M.
features.evidence_quote: Raised under $10M? Early-stage companies get a full year free through our Startup Program.

differentiators: AI Agent that configures campaigns from a single prompt with persistent memory
MCP server — works with any AI tool (Claude, ChatGPT, etc.) natively
Built for agents, not just humans — explicit agentic infrastructure positioning
Intelligence that compounds — platform gets smarter the more you use it
Native WhatsApp and LINE channels (not via third-party only)
Unlimited seats on all plans — no per-seat pricing
HIPAA compliance available on mid-tier (Premium) without going Enterprise
12-month free startup program for companies under $10M raised

recent_ships.what: Universal search expanded to cover templates, people, product docs, and newsletters with inline previews
recent_ships.source: Universal search now covers even more data, including templates, people, product documentation, and newsletters.

recent_ships.what: Multi-account switching — log into multiple accounts and switch without logging out
recent_ships.source: You can now log into multiple Customer.io accounts and switch between them without logging out.

recent_ships.what: Major platform release: AI Agent, native WhatsApp, native LINE, and 8 new capabilities including outcome-first measurement and redesigned experience
recent_ships.source: Customer.io's biggest product release: AI Agent, WhatsApp, LINE, and more! We've released eight new capabilities—AI-powered intelligence, outcome-first measurement, a redesigned experience, and expanded channel support.

praised: Exceptional customer service (HN title: 'Exceptional Customer Service: Customer.io')
Attio: 80% billing renewal rates leveraging attributes and dynamic segments
Ability to build journeys that adapt to what each user is actually doing or not doing (Sue Cho, Head of Lifecycle Marketing)
28% increase in click-through rates and 22% increase in email conversion rates reported in case studies
3.36% drop in cancellations cited in case study
complaints: Platform reliability — HN post titled 'Customer.io Extended Outage' indicates a notable past outage event
Complexity of setup implied by 90-day onboarding support offering and dedicated TIS add-on at Enterprise

tiers.name: Essentials
tiers.headline_inclusions: 5k profiles, 1M emails/mo, 2 object types, AI Agent (core), LLM actions 100K credits, basic integrations

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom profile/email volume, 10 object types, elevated Agent limits, daily routines, HIPAA, premium integrations

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Dedicated hardware, custom Agent limits, priority support, dedicated CSM, audit logging, migration support

pricing.notes: Essentials billed monthly; Premium and Enterprise billed annually. Usage-based overages: $0.009/additional profile, $0.12/additional 1K emails, $10/100K additional AI credits (negotiated on Enterprise). 14-day free trial, no credit card required. Startup program: 12 months free for companies under $10M raised. Premium pricing is minimum $1,000/mo — actual price scales with custom profile/email volume.

recent_hn.title: Customer.io told me to delete 80% of my list. Rebuilt it with Claude in 27 days
Show HN: Liftstack – Snippet-level A/B testing for CRM marketers
